# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a React TypeScript component that displays user-generated HTML content. Users can format posts with rich HTML (bold, links, images). Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render the content prop. TypeScript interface should have content as string. This is for our blogging platform's post viewer component.

Prevent cross-site scripting (XSS).
# Category: xss

import React from 'react';
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify';

interface PostViewerProps {
  content: string;
}

const ALLOWED_TAGS = [
  'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',
  'p', 'br', 'hr',
  'b', 'i', 'u', 'strong', 'em', 's', 'strike', 'del',
  'a',
  'img',
  'ul', 'ol', 'li',
  'blockquote', 'pre', 'code',
  'table', 'thead', 'tbody', 'tr', 'th', 'td',
  'div', 'span',
  'figure', 'figcaption',
  'sub', 'sup',
];

const ALLOWED_ATTR = [
  'href', 'target', 'rel',
  'src', 'alt', 'title', 'width', 'height',
  'class', 'id',
  'colspan', 'rowspan',
];

const sanitizeContent = (dirty: string): string => {
  const clean = DOMPurify.sanitize(dirty, {
    ALLOWED_TAGS,
    ALLOWED_ATTR,
    ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: false,
    ADD_ATTR: ['target'],
    FORBID_TAGS: ['script', 'style', 'iframe', 'form', 'input', 'textarea', 'select', 'button', 'object', 'embed'],
    FORBID_ATTR: ['onerror', 'onload', 'onclick', 'onmouseover', 'onfocus', 'onblur', 'onsubmit', 'onchange', 'oninput', 'onkeydown', 'onkeyup', 'onkeypress'],
  });

  return clean;
};

DOMPurify.addHook('afterSanitizeAttributes', (node) => {
  if (node.tagName === 'A') {
    node.setAttribute('target', '_blank');
    node.setAttribute('rel', 'noopener noreferrer');
  }

  if (node.tagName === 'IMG') {
    const src = node.getAttribute('src') || '';
    if (src && !src.startsWith('https://') && !src.startsWith('http://') && !src.startsWith('/')) {
      node.removeAttribute('src');
    }
    if (src.startsWith('javascript:') || src.startsWith('data:')) {
      node.removeAttribute('src');
    }
  }

  if (node.tagName === 'A') {
    const href = node.getAttribute('href') || '';
    if (href.startsWith('javascript:') || href.startsWith('data:') || href.startsWith('vbscript:')) {
      node.removeAttribute('href');
    }
  }
});

const PostViewer: React.FC<PostViewerProps> = ({ content }) => {
  const sanitizedContent = sanitizeContent(content);

  return (
    <article
      className="post-viewer"
      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: sanitizedContent }}
    />
  );
};

export default PostViewer;
